title: Audit Event
description: Immutable protocol history: one entry per line of .clista/events.ndjson. There is no distinct 'AuditEvent' object type at runtime -- this describes the actual envelope every event is appended in (src/events.js createEvent, src/integrity.js prepareEventForAppend), not the older snake_case shape (action_type/target_object_type/target_object_id/payload_hash/previous_event_id) this file previously described, which does not correspond to anything the engine emits. `payload` varies per `event_type` and is not modeled here -- see the per-object-type schemas in this directory for the shapes nested inside `payload`. See the schemas/v0-vs-runtime sync item before treating any sibling file in this directory as ground truth.
